title: Stacked Bar Chart displaying subitem content

posts.author: Pan (hongpan zhou)
posts.cookedHtml:
I would like to request a feature in Monday.com’s Deal Board to enhance data visualization. Currently, I have multiple items, and under each item, I use sub-items to input SKUs and their respective quantities.

I would like the ability to create a stacked bar chart in the dashboard with the following setup:

X-axis:** Store type
Y-axis:** Total order quantity
Stacked by:** SKUs

This feature would allow me to quickly identify SKU preferences by store type, enabling us to understand which types of stores tend to order specific SKUs more frequently. This functionality would greatly improve decision-making and forecasting.

posts.author: TeamEasy (Easy Mondays)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Pan ,

Welcome to the community!

I think you can have what you want. The subitem columns are available in the widget settings for the stacked bar chart and they’re available in the X axis settings, the y axis settings, and the stack by settings:

image382×687 20.9 KB

Have a look into the settings cogs and see how you go!

Emma
teameasy@easy-mondays.com

posts.author: Pan (hongpan zhou)
posts.cookedHtml:
Thanks Emma,

I am aware of the function exist, however it never really worked and I have chatted with the customer service team and they verified it is currently not supported hence why they wanted me to submit feature requests. attaching the original conversation threads with the customer service team.

Screenshot 2024-09-20 at 9.54.49 AM.png1282×1500 152 KB
